task_completion.description: Create a 'Cost Category' custom field of type List with the specified options, enabled for Task, Bug, and Feature types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Administration > Custom fields page or the specific field configuration. Verify 'Cost Category' exists, is a 'List' format, shows options (Labor, Materials, Equipment, Subcontractor, Overhead), and is enabled for Task, Bug, and Feature types.

task_completion.description: Create an 'Estimated Budget (USD)' custom field of type Float or Integer, enabled for Task, Bug, and Feature types.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Administration > Custom fields page or the specific field configuration. Verify 'Estimated Budget (USD)' exists, is an Integer or Float format, and is enabled for Task, Bug, and Feature types.

task_completion.description: Enable both custom fields for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Project Settings > Custom fields tab for the 'E-Commerce Platform' project and verify both fields are activated/checked, OR verify the fields were marked 'For all projects' in their global configuration.

task_completion.description: Update the 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' work package with the correct Cost Category and Estimated Budget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the work package 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' in a list or detail view. Verify that the 'Cost Category' field is set to 'Labor' and the 'Estimated Budget (USD)' field is set to '15000' (or 15,000).

task_completion.description: Update the 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' work package with the correct Cost Category and Estimated Budget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the work package 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' in a list or detail view. Verify that the 'Cost Category' field is set to 'Labor' and the 'Estimated Budget (USD)' field is set to '5000' (or 5,000).

task_completion.description: Update the 'Optimize database queries for category listing' work package with the correct Cost Category and Estimated Budget.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the work package 'Optimize database queries for category listing' in a list or detail view. Verify that the 'Cost Category' field is set to 'Equipment' and the 'Estimated Budget (USD)' field is set to '8000' (or 8,000).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenProject application (e.g., Administration panels, Work Package lists), not a text editor or API client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show the agent using curl, rails console, or database commands to create fields or update work packages directly.

integrity.description: The custom fields and work package updates appear as genuine data within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The custom fields should appear in the actual OpenProject UI elements (dropdowns, input fields, tables) rather than being typed into a generic text file or floating note.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Project: 'E-Commerce Platform'. Custom Field 1: 'Cost Category' (Options: Labor, Materials, Equipment, Subcontractor, Overhead). Custom Field 2: 'Estimated Budget (USD)'. Target Work Packages and Updates: 1) 'Implement product search with Elasticsearch' -> Cost Category: Labor, Budget: 15000. 2) 'Fix broken checkout on mobile Safari' -> Cost Category: Labor, Budget: 5000. 3) 'Optimize database queries for category listing' -> Cost Category: Equipment, Budget: 8000.
